name: Bomb Bowling 2
short_description: Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Kick the pins out of the screen using explosions!
detailed_description:
Wishlist Epic Auto Towers, a game from our son, a professional game developer!


Update Notes

We have edited some levels to make the game more harmonious.


About the Game

  • Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics.
  • Knock the pins off the screen using explosions.
  • Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click.
  • The sequel of the Bomb Bowling.
  • 50 levels with new contents.
  • Hone your skills before a new challenges!

reviews.review_text:
Pretty relaxing game, it's short but cool if you want to chill out. 
Bomb Bowling 2  10/10 
Heisen.
This game + your favorite podcast = nice combo

A simple physics-based puzzle game with some interesting mechanics. 

A fun little game! Would be great for kids.

Framerate seemed a bit jerky, which is weird since I don't think this kind of game would be that resource intensive, and I have a pretty fast gaming machine.

Pins must be completely gone from the play field not just knocked over.

Beware if anything flying up goes out of view, it's gone, timing really needs to be on point at times.

First play, 30 mins, made it to level 20, the first couple are hard to fail,  but fast mousing/clicking will eventually test your reflexes under pressure.

Not scored like bowling in any way shape or form.

Fast restart of level is just one click away as well.

Has adequate sound and graphics, and enjoyed!
It is ok for what it is. Game was made using GameMaker so don't expect too much from it.
